name: bronkit
description: MCP server for Bron treasury operations — USD-priced portfolio, FIFO cost basis & P&L, staking/yield opportunities, transactions, address book, and preview-first withdrawals. Talks to the Bron API directly over signed requests; no bundled binary.

bron_api_key.title: Bron API key (raw JWK JSON)
bron_api_key.description: Paste the contents of your Bron JWK key file. Held in the OS keychain and used in-memory only — never written to disk.

bron_workspace_id.title: Bron workspace ID
bron_workspace_id.description: UUID of the workspace this server talks to.
